notes: Passive readout only — no action handlers, no chat partial. Gift acquisition/removal lives elsewhere (compendium drop, GM tooling).

Panel context (giftsPanel) is built in character-sheet._prepareContext by mapping actor.system.gifts ids through the catalogue (compendium/uuidNameCache) and resolveGiftForAlignment(gift, actor.system.chaosAlignment), then mergeGiftDeltas across the resolved set.
Uses existing WH40K.BC.Gifts.* i18n keys only — no new keys added.
Gated on tab-overview.hbs via isBC; non-BC sheets never see the panel.
